content.en:
"There are actually thirty-six Second Realm existences!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Obviously, this is not the whole story.

And leaving so many second realms at one time is also a huge loss to the Six Thousand Territory, which will make the strength here even weaker~.

But the extradimensional forces don't care about that, as long as they don't pose a threat to them, then that's fine.

There are more first realms here, there are thousands of first realms, and they obviously want to leave the territory of the sixth thousand, and feel that it is easier to break through to the second realm when they enter the territory of the fifth thousand.

However, there are more cultivators over there, and if you don't have a background, the difficulty of cultivating is huge, and even dangerous.

After all, on this side, the extra-dimensional realms of the first realm are all top-notch existences, as long as they don't provoke the second realm, it is difficult to encounter any danger.

But on the other side of the 5000th Realm, there are many dangers, and the Death Void is even more dangerous, and it is easy to encounter extradimensional creatures in the second or even third realm.

If you want to survive there, it's extremely difficult.

These transcendent realms of the first realm have fallen a lot in the past.

But Ye Tian wouldn't say this, these transcendent realms of the first realm are estimated to be mentally prepared, but they all fantasize that nothing will happen to them, and they all dream that they can advance to the second realm or even the third realm in the future.

But how can it be so easy!

......

"Tianyang Realm Lord, you're here!"

Ye Tian looked at the Tianyang Realm Lord who had just arrived and shouted.

The other party's speed is slightly slower than his own, and he will come in the evening for a while.

"You took the entire Tianyang family with you?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Tianyang Realm Lord couldn't completely cover the situation of the void in his body, and with Ye Tian's cultivation as the realm, he naturally saw that there were several first-realm super-dimensional realms in the main body of the Tianyang Realm, as well as a large number of half-step super-dimensional realms, peak realm gods, high-level realm gods, and other aura, which obviously took away the Tianyang family.

"Yes!" The Tianyang Realm Lord said helplessly: "I choose to leave, if the Tianyang Family doesn't leave, the enemies of the past will tear apart the Tianyang Family, so we must take all the Tianyang Family away, but there are still some clansmen who are unwilling to leave, and I will scatter them over the years, so it will be easy to survive." "

Ye Tian didn't say anything, the Tianyang Realm Lord's move was indeed very risky, in case he encountered some trouble, even if the Tianyang Realm Lord did not fall, the members of the Tianyang Family in his body would easily fall!

In any big battle, as long as the other party injures the void in his body, he can erase the Tianyang family.

But the Tianyang Realm Lord chose to do so, so he naturally wouldn't say anything.

Soon, almost everything that was due to come came.

At this time, the extradimensional realms of the Escape Alliance began to move.

Ye Tian also had to do these extra-dimensional realms that had temporarily joined in, otherwise he wouldn't have brought them here.

Ye Tian was assigned to a position and existed as a formation node, and when the time came, he would cooperate with the other second realms to tear apart the weak points of the boundary extradimensional barrier.

After all these extradimensional realms were assigned, the second realms began to move.

Rumble!!!!!

A large amount of extradimensional realm power seemed to fuse into one point, forming a terrifying ray of light.

The speed of this ray is not fast, if you kill the second realm, you will naturally not be able to do it, but if the second realm does not dodge, no matter how powerful the second realm is, it will be shattered by this blow.

The power of this blow was almost reaching the threshold of the third realm.

Click!!!

The boundary extradimensional barrier was torn apart, and according to the calculations of the Boundary Alliance, from this position, the opposite side was the territory of 5,991.

Soon, the Boundary Extradimensional Barrier connected the territory of 5,991.

"Let's go!"

All the extradimensional realms shuttled through in an instant, and before the boundary extradimensional barrier was healed, they successfully reached the territory of 5991.

And not long after Ye Tian and the others left, one after another figures appeared, all of them were the existence of the second realm, and they were all from the second realm among the top twenty forces in the Six Thousand Territory.

"This formation of the Escape Alliance is really good, it really let them pass!"

"In the past, we kept blocking news from there, and they didn't know anything about it. If I'm not guessing wrong, their position should be the Yanyang Sea of the 5991 Territory. "

"It should be the Yanyang Sea, where it is the territory of the extra-dimensional creature - the Nine-Eyed Giant Spider Clan, although this clan is very weak, but there are a lot of races, and they are very exclusive to the outside world, and there are no good things, many big forces are too lazy to deal with it. These first and second realms have passed, and if they want to escape the territory of the Nine-Eyed Giant Spider Clan, I'm afraid they will have to fall most of them!"

"This group of extradimensional realms is too naïve, even if they leave the territory of the sixth thousand and enter the territory of the fifth thousand, the danger will not be mentioned, even if they survive, they may not have the nourishment of this side. "

As he spoke, these second realms left. []

......

Territory No. 5991.

Ye Tian and the others came in, but they did not fall in the Death Void, but in a crimson strange ocean, which was filled with majestic energy.

However, the suppressive power here is also far beyond the territory of the Six Thousand Numbers.

Every extradimensional realm felt a very large oppressive force, as if they had entered a high-latitude void from a low-latitude void, but with their strength, they were able to adapt quickly.

"Where is this?"

A First Realm said solemnly.

The energy here is majestic, and it seems to be a treasure land, but if it is a very dangerous place, with their strength, it will be troublesome.

"Let's go!"

One of the first realms hurriedly said, as if he sensed that danger was coming, and he didn't dare to stay here any longer.

And the second realm masters of the Tianyang Realm did not intend to mix with the Escape Realm Alliance, so they directly chose to leave alone.

The same goes for Ye Tian.

"Lord of the Moon Realm, do you know where this is?"

Ye Tian asked.

The will of the Moon Realm Lord sensed the outside world, and immediately said: "This is the territory of 5,991, then there is a high probability that it is the Yanyang Sea, and this is the territory of the Nine-Eyed Giant Spider Clan. "

"What is the strength of the Nine-Eyed Giant Spider Clan?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Moon Realm thought back for a moment and said, "I don't know very well, but the Nine-Eyed Giant Spider Clan should not have a third realm, because I almost have a little bit of understanding of the forces of the third realm or the extradimensional creature clan, but the Nine-Eyed Giant Spider clan should have a lot of second realms." However, we still have to leave, the territory of 5991 is not the territory of 6000, the area here may be smaller than the territory of 6000, but the resources and opportunities are far beyond the territory of 6000, and there is a third realm powerhouse here. "

"Even the territory of 5,991 has a third realm????"

Ye Tian was very shocked.
